appsync.resolver.CfnAbout:
The `AWS::AppSync::Resolver` resource defines the logical GraphQL resolver that you attach to fields in a schema. Request and response templates for resolvers are written in Apache Velocity Template Language (VTL) format. For more information about resolvers, see [Resolver Mapping Template Reference](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/appsync/latest/devguide/resolver-mapping-template-reference.html).

**Note**  
When you submit an update, AWS CloudFormation updates resources based on differences between what you submit and the stack's current template. To cause this resource to be updated you must change a property value for this resource in the CloudFormation template. Changing the Amazon S3 file content without changing a property value will not result in an update operation.  
See [Update Behaviors of Stack Resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/using-cfn-updating-stacks-update-behaviors.html) in the *AWS CloudFormation User Guide*.

appsync.resolver.ApiId.Description: The AWS AppSync GraphQL API to which you want to attach this resolver.

appsync.resolver.CachingConfig.Description: The caching configuration for the resolver.

appsync.resolver.FieldName.Description: The GraphQL field on a type that invokes the resolver.

appsync.resolver.Kind.Description: The resolver type.  +  **UNIT**: A UNIT resolver type. A UNIT resolver is the default resolver type. You can use a UNIT resolver to run a GraphQL query against a single data source.+  **PIPELINE**: A PIPELINE resolver type. You can use a PIPELINE resolver to invoke a series of `Function` objects in a serial manner. You can use a pipeline resolver to run a GraphQL query against multiple data sources.
appsync.resolver.Kind.Kind` <a name=\"cfn-appsync-resolver-ki:
A UNIT resolver type\. A UNIT resolver is the default resolver type\. You can use a UNIT resolver to run a GraphQL query against a single data source\.
+  **PIPELINE*

appsync.resolver.MaxBatchSize.Description: The maximum number of resolver request inputs that will be sent to a single AWS Lambda function in a `BatchInvoke` operation.

appsync.resolver.PipelineConfig.Description: Functions linked with the pipeline resolver.

appsync.resolver.RequestMappingTemplate.Description: The request mapping template.  Request mapping templates are optional when using a Lambda data source. For all other data sources, a request mapping template is required.

appsync.resolver.RequestMappingTemplateS.Description: The location of a request mapping template in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use this if you want to provision with a template file in Amazon S3 rather than embedding it in your CloudFormation template.

appsync.resolver.ResponseMappingTemplate.Description: The location of a response mapping template in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use this if you want to provision with a template file in Amazon S3 rather than embedding it in your CloudFormation template.

appsync.resolver.SyncConfig.Description: The `SyncConfig` for a resolver attached to a versioned data source.

appsync.resolver.TypeName.Description: The GraphQL type that invokes this resolver.
